description.zh-Hans: 生成木栅栏/栏杆/木桩图案，具有重复的垂直板条、可选的水平横栏、木纹细节、逐板颜色变化、风化效果以及钉子/螺丝细节。所有噪波均可平铺。
description.en: Generates wooden fence / railing / palisade patterns with repeating vertical slats, optional horizontal rails, wood grain detail, per-plank color variation, weathering, and nail/screw details. All noise is tileable.

triggers.zh-Hans: 栅栏, 木栅栏, 栏杆, 木桩

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为像素艺术游戏场景生成带木纹和风化效果的尖顶木栅栏。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a pointed-top wooden fence with wood grain and weathering for a pixel art game scene.
